info.title: SalesCaptain API Documentation Service
info.description:
API Documentation Service for SalesCaptain platform.
This service provides endpoints for managing and retrieving company information for API documentation purposes.

get.description: Returns basic service information and health status

Retrieves a list of companies associated with the authenticated user's accounts.
This endpoint fetches company information from the main SalesCaptain API based on 
the company IDs associated with the user's accounts.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific company by its unique identifier.

get.summary: Fetch all accounts for authenticated user
get.description:
Retrieves a list of all accounts associated with the authenticated user.
Returns account details including access level, contact information, and last login time.

Retrieves detailed information about a specific account by its unique identifier.
Returns account details including access level, contact information, and last login time.

get.summary: List conversation profiles for a company
get.description:
Retrieves all conversation profiles associated with a specific company.
Conversation profiles represent communication channels like phone lines, email addresses, etc.
Retrieves detailed information about a specific conversation profile by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: conversation_profile_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the conversation profile

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of contacts associated with a specific company.
Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination options.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: Page number for pagination (must be a positive integer)

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: Number of items per page (10-100, default 10)

value.message: Please provide a valid page_number (must be a positive integer)
sort_by must be one of: name, number, email, created_at
filter must be one of: phone, email, facebook, instagram, whatsapp

get.summary: Fetch a single contact by ID
get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific contact by its unique identifier.

get.summary: List all custom fields for a company
get.description:
Retrieves all custom field definitions associated with a specific company.
Custom fields allow companies to store additional contact information.

get.summary: Get a single custom field by ID
get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific custom field definition by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: custom_field_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the custom field

BearerAuth.description:
Authentication token required for accessing protected endpoints.
The token should be obtained from the main SalesCaptain authentication service.

path.description: API endpoint path where the error occurred

accounts.description: List of accounts associated with the user

permissions.description: List of permissions for this account

access_level.description: User's access level within the account

last_login.description: Timestamp of the user's last login

ConversationProfile.description: Conversation profile representing a communication channel

conversation_profile_id.description: Unique identifier for the conversation profile

name.description: Display name for the conversation profile

number.description: Phone number associated with the profile (null if not applicable)

email.description: Email address associated with the profile

color.description: Hex color code for UI display

created_at.description: Timestamp when the contact was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the contact was last updated

tags.description: List of tags associated with the contact

custom_fields.description: List of custom fields for the contact

total_count.description: Total number of items across all pages

cf_id.description: Unique identifier for the custom field

cf_name.description: Internal name of the custom field (lowercase, no spaces)

cf_label.description: Display label for the custom field

cf_datatype.description: Data type of the custom field

cf_description.description: Description of the custom field's purpose

created_at.description: Timestamp when the custom field was created

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the custom field was last updated

UnauthorizedError.description: Authentication token is missing or invalid

ForbiddenError.description: Access forbidden - valid token but insufficient permissions

example.error: Too many requests, please try again later

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Time when the rate limit resets

tags.name: Conversation Profiles
tags.description: Conversation profile management for communication channels
